---
title: "Jason Collins"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: Twitter/X
      href: https://x.com/jasonacollins
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jasonallancollins/
---

Behavioural economics, data science and artificial intelligence. PhD economics and evolutionary biology.

### Blog

[blog.jcx.au](https://blog.jcx.au) — writing on behavioural economics, AI, and decision-making

### Research

[Academic publications](https://blog.jcx.au/research/) and [UTS work profile](https://profiles.uts.edu.au/Jason.Collins)

### Teaching

[Teaching](https://blog.jcx.au/teaching/) — course notes on behavioural economics, behavioural finance, trial design, and more

### Writing

[Non-academic writing](https://blog.jcx.au/writing/) — pieces for Behavioral Scientist, Works in Progress, and others

### Consulting

I am open to consulting and expert witness work in behavioural economics and human-AI interaction. Find me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jasonallancollins/).

---

<p align="center" style="margin-left: 10px; margin-right: 10px;">BE NOTIFIED OF NEW POSTS VIA EMAIL
<iframe src="https://newsletter.jasoncollins.blog/embed" width="360" height="110" style="border:0px; background:white;" frameborder="0" scrolling="no"></iframe></p>
